title: Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health
tagline: Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health, also known as Sanctuary of Our Lady of Velankanni, is a Christian shrine located at the town of Velankanni, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health, also known as Sanctuary of Our Lady of Velankanni, is a Christian shrine located at the town of Velankanni, Tamil Nadu, India. The shrine is dedicated to the Blessed Virgin Mary. The devotion has existed since the mid-sixteenth century, it is attributed to three separate events which occurred at the site: The apparition of the Madonna and Child to a slumbering shepherd boy, the miraculous healing of a handicapped buttermilk vendor and the rescue of Portuguese sailors from a deadly sea storm. Initially, a modest chapel was built by the Portuguese from Go

topPlaces.name: Velankanni
topPlaces.description: Velankanni (Vēḷāṅkaṇṇi) is a special grade town panchayat in Nagapattinam district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the Coromandel Coast of the Bay of Bengal, 350 km south of Chennai (Madras), 12 km south of Nagapattinam, and 33 km southeast of Thiruvarur.

topPlaces.name: Nandinadesvarar Temple, Poikainallur
topPlaces.description: Nandinadesvarar Temple is a Siva temple in Poigainallur in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Akkaraipettai
topPlaces.description: Akkaraipettai is a fishing village located in Kelvelur taluk Nagapattinam district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The population was 6,672 at the 2011 Census.

topPlaces.name: Kameswaram
topPlaces.description: Kameswaram is a coastal village in the Nagapattinam District of Tamil Nadu state in India. It is referred to as Thirupoondi East in government records.

topPlaces.name: Soundararajaperumal Temple, Nagapattinam
topPlaces.description: The Soundararajaperumal Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god, Vishnu. It is located in Nagapattinam, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nagapattinam Port
topPlaces.description: Nagapattinam Port (nākappaṭṭinam, previously spelt Nagapatnam or Negapatam) is a port in the South Indian town of Nagapattinam in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a natural port located in the shores of Bay of Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Nagapattinam
topPlaces.description: Nagapattinam (nākappaṭṭinam, previously spelt Nagapatnam or Negapatam) is a city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu and the administrative headquarters of Nagapattinam district. The town came to prominence during the period of Medieval Cholas (9th–12th century CE) and served as their important port for commerce and east-bound naval expeditions.

topPlaces.name: Veezhinathar Kovil, Thiruveezhimizhalai
topPlaces.description: Veezhinathar Temple (வீழிநாதர் கோயில், திருவீழிமிழலை ]) is an ancient temple located in Thiruveezhimizhalai dedicated to Lord Shiva. Thiruveezhimizhalai is a revenue village in Kudavasal Taluka of Thiruvarur District in Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Velankanni (Vēḷāṅkaṇṇi) is a special grade town panchayat in Nagapattinam district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the Coromandel Coast of the Bay of Bengal, 350 km south of Chennai (Madras), 12 km south of Nagapattinam, and 33 km southeast of Thiruvarur.
Nandinadesvarar Temple is a Siva temple in Poigainallur in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu, India.
Akkaraipettai is a fishing village located in Kelvelur taluk Nagapattinam district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The population was 6,672 at the 2011 Census.
Kameswaram is a coastal village in the Nagapattinam District of Tamil Nadu state in India. It is referred to as Thirupoondi East in government records.
The Soundararajaperumal Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god, Vishnu. It is located in Nagapattinam, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Nagapattinam Port (nākappaṭṭinam, previously spelt Nagapatnam or Negapatam) is a port in the South Indian town of Nagapattinam in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a natural port located in the shores of Bay of Bengal.

Nagapattinam (nākappaṭṭinam, previously spelt Nagapatnam or Negapatam) is a city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu and the administrative headquarters of Nagapattinam district. The town came to prominence during the period of Medieval Cholas (9th–12th century CE) and served as their important port for commerce and east-bound naval expeditions.

Veezhinathar Temple (வீழிநாதர் கோயில், திருவீழிமிழலை ]) is an ancient temple located in Thiruveezhimizhalai dedicated to Lord Shiva. Thiruveezhimizhalai is a revenue village in Kudavasal Taluka of Thiruvarur District in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (125 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (127 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of Good Health?
faq.a: The top attractions are Velankanni, Nandinadesvarar Temple, Poikainallur, Akkaraipettai, Kameswaram, Soundararajaperumal Temple, Nagapattinam.
